name: Enhancing Small Language Models Reasoning through Knowledge Graph Grounding
summary: arXiv:2607.14149v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Although large language models (LLMs) have set benchmarks for zero-shot reasoning, their deployment remains cost-prohibitive and environmentally taxi...
description: arXiv:2607.14149v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Although large language models (LLMs) have set benchmarks for zero-shot reasoning, their deployment remains cost-prohibitive and environmentally taxing. Small Language Models (SLMs) offer a sustainable alternative, but prone to errors, on tasks requiring complex, multi-hop logical grounding. We investigate a neuro-symbolic agentic framework to enh...
author: Dimitrios Kelesis, Konstantinos Bougiatiotis, Georgios Paliouras
